system_slow: Grade portal reports slow response times. Parents cannot view student results. Check database query latency and caching strategy for performance degradation.
grade_sync_fail: Student grades fail to synchronize from management system to parent portal. Investigate sync service errors in logs and database replication.
payment_timeout: Tuition payment gateway times out. Parents cannot submit payments. Check payment processor integration and timeout thresholds.
email_not_sent: Grade notifications and schedule change alerts fail to reach parents. Check email service logs, SMTP connection, and notification queue.
data_leak: Student personal data (name, DOB, email) appears unscraped in logs. PII scrubbing filter is not functioning correctly or was bypassed.
high_api_calls: API rate limits exceeded during peak hours. Parents receive 429 Too Many Requests errors. Check rate limiting configuration and traffic patterns.
database_connection_pool: Database connection pool exhaustion during high user load. Queries timeout and services degrade. Monitor connection pool size and query execution time.
cache_miss_spike: Unexpected drop in cache hit ratio causes latency spike. Database queries increase 10x. Check cache invalidation logic and TTL settings.
